seoTitle: Lewisham vs Liberty Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lewisham and Liberty Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lewisham vs Liberty Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lewisham and Liberty Grove.
heading: Lewisham vs Liberty Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lewisham, New South Wales and Liberty Grove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lewisham has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Liberty Grove (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lewisham or Liberty Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lewisham has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Liberty Grove scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lewisham scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Liberty Grove scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lewisham or Liberty Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lewisham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
